items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for HIPAA-compliant handling for medical letters as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no direct evidence presented that confirms the implementation or compliance with HIPAA standards for handling medical letters. The prior steps focus on other functionalities and do not address this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this need.
